task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the SEB Server interface at localhost:8080, indicating a successful login (e.g., dashboard or administration menu visible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Exam Configuration creation page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or page titled 'Create Exam Configuration', 'Add Configuration', or similar is open in the SEB Server interface.
The text input field for the configuration Name contains exactly 'CS101 Final Exam Configuration'.
The text input field for the configuration Description contains exactly 'Secure configuration for CS101 Introduction to Computer Science final examination'.
The checkbox or toggle associated with the label 'Allow browser window reload' is visibly unchecked or set to disabled/off.
The checkbox or toggle associated with the label 'Allow Virtual Machine Detection' is visibly checked or set to enabled/on.
A success notification indicating the configuration was saved, or the new 'CS101 Final Exam Configuration' is visible in the list of saved exam configurations.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to create the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the SEB Server web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to send API requests.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows localhost:8080 and the UI matches a genuine web application, not a local text file or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a terminal and using MySQL/MariaDB command-line tools to insert the configuration directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected exam configuration name is exactly 'CS101 Final Exam Configuration'. The backend verification script explicitly queries the MariaDB database for this exact string to confirm task completion.
